title: On R.A., Esq.
content:
Know thou, O stranger to the fame
        Of this much lov'd, much honour'd name!
        (For none that knew him need be told)
        A warmer heart death ne'er made cold.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "On R.A., Esq."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
